summary: Iteration 12 — Wave Pal Pen Pals + Campaigns Discount CTA integration. Created /app/backend/tests/test_penpals.py (14 tests, all passing). Public + admin pen-pals endpoints, rate limit, cache, PII strip, banned-word block, soft-delete, settings round-trip, disable→503, all verified via API + DB. Frontend pen-pals public flow tested end-to-end with live Gemini LLM reply (333-char rhyme came back in ~7s, quota chip decreased 5→4, history accumulated, no popup-signup). Admin Pen Pals UI fully wired (settings panel + all 4 controls + search + soft delete works). Campaign Editor discount CTA tested — picker shows 4 active codes (SAVE20/SAVE5/FREESHIP/CAMP10), clicking SAVE20 inserts heading+paragraph+button+spacer blocks, toast confirms, /shop?code=SAVE20 link present in DOM. Fixed one critical backend routing bug; pre-existing readaloud regression flagged.
action_items: Regression in /app/backend/tests/test_readaloud_and_regression.py — book now has 21 pages (expected 20) and page 1 character is 'myrtle' not 'ms-bluegill'. 3 tests fail. NOT caused by this iteration but spec requires 'previous suites still pass'. Either update the test expectations to 21 pages / new speaker map, or restore the original seed. Failing tests: test_public_get_book_returns_20_pages, test_speaker_assignments_match_spec, test_admin_get_book_full_payload.
Consider seeding a 'demo' campaign so admins land on a non-empty Campaigns page (UX nice-to-have).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: penpals_router.py admin sub-router had prefix='/pen-pals' instead of '/admin/pen-pals'. This caused (a) frontend AdminPenPals.jsx calls to /admin/pen-pals/* to 404 and (b) the admin GET /pen-pals/settings to collide-shadow with the public route. Changed prefix to '/admin/pen-pals' — all admin routes now mount at /api/admin/pen-pals/{letters,settings} as required.

penpals_router._BANNED_WORDS is a tiny ad-hoc list ('kill','die','hate','stupid','dumb','ugly'). Adequate for MVP but recommended to upgrade to better-profanity or similar before public launch — current implementation will miss most real-world swearing.

penpals_router.post_letter computes `letters_left_today = daily_cap - used - 1` from a pre-increment count; if two requests race they could both see used=4 and both succeed when cap=5. Low risk for kids but a `find_one_and_update` increment with check would be safer.
PenPals.jsx `lettersLeft` is derived from localStorage history, which can drift from server reality on a fresh device. The server still enforces the cap (returns 429) so it's a UX-only inconsistency.
discount picker in AdminCampaignEditor pulls from /admin/discounts and filters client-side for active=true. Consider a server-side ?active=1 filter if discount lists grow large.

success_rate.backend: 100% on pen-pals (14/14) + discounts (15/15) + shipstation (full suite) ; readaloud has 3 pre-existing failures unrelated to this iteration
success_rate.frontend: 100% on Pen Pals public flow, Admin Pen Pals, Campaign Editor discount CTA insertion

seed_data_creation: Created campaign 'TEST_DiscountCTA_Iter12' (id 9c5feadbc5214ccf9a1f2863b32d5637) during frontend testing of discount-CTA. Multiple TEST_ visitor letters auto-cleaned by autouse fixture; remaining DB letters from real-name visitors retained.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pen Pals feature is fully tested. Backend admin routes live at /api/admin/pen-pals/{letters,settings}. Use pytest /app/backend/tests/test_penpals.py as regression. Frontend visitor_id key is mr_visitor_id; clear localStorage between tests for clean quota chip values. For campaign editor: admin must create a campaign first (no seed). LLM is live Gemini Flash via emergentintegrations — replies take 4-10s — set Playwright wait_for_selector timeout >=15000ms when waiting for [data-testid='penpals-reply']. Readaloud regression (21 pages vs 20) is unresolved and may block 'all previous suites pass' acceptance — main agent should reconcile the test expectations with the new seed.
rca_of_the_issue: Bug: admin pen-pals endpoints unreachable. Root cause: in penpals_router.py the admin APIRouter was declared with prefix='/pen-pals' and then included into the public router which already mounts under '/api/pen-pals', producing final routes '/api/pen-pals/letters', '/api/pen-pals/settings'. Frontend (AdminPenPals.jsx) and spec both expect '/api/admin/pen-pals/*'. Reproduction: GET /api/admin/pen-pals/letters → 404. Fix: changed `admin = APIRouter(prefix='/admin/pen-pals', ...)` so routes mount as /api/admin/pen-pals/{...}. Verified via openapi.json and 14 passing pytest cases.
